title: Soak Test  - Headset connected, app in the background, phone idle
scenario: Soak test to verify app remains running and responsive after several hours idle with headset connected and app in background
steps: Install and launch the app, pair the headset, then navigate to the Home Screen.
Put the app in the background and leave the phone idle for multiple hours (ideally overnight).
After several hours, check that the app is still running and responsive.
expected: App remains running and responsive after prolonged idle period with headset connected and app in background. No memory leaks or crashes.
